Hero.description: Experience the sanctuary of modern healthcare. CareHub brings precision, clarity, and security to your medical journey, connecting patients and professionals seamlessly.

BentoFeatures.description: From intelligent prescription safety checks to daily medication reminders, CareHub fuses clinical precision with an unforgettable user experience.
BentoFeatures.feature1Desc: Prescribe with absolute confidence. Our engine analyzes real-time drug interactions and patient allergies before the prescription is even finalized.
BentoFeatures.feature2Desc: Chat with our medical AI to find the perfect specialist and get personalized guidance.
BentoFeatures.feature3Desc: Instant, paperless Rx routing. Clear dosages directly in your pocket.
BentoFeatures.feature4Desc: Your entire history—vitals, blood pressure, sugar levels, and lab results—consolidated into beautifully rendered, easy-to-read charts available anytime.

PlatformWorkflow.title: A Seamless Workflow
PlatformWorkflow.description: Experience healthcare without friction. Our platform ensures that the medical journey doesn't end when the patient leaves the clinic.
PlatformWorkflow.step1Desc: Doctor performs diagnosis and builds a smart prescription instantly.
PlatformWorkflow.step2Desc: Data is securely encrypted and routed directly to the patient's profile.
PlatformWorkflow.step3Desc: Patient follows the interactive schedule, logs vitals, and builds adherence streaks.
PlatformWorkflow.step4Desc: Doctor monitors progress through real-time adherence analytics and charts.

AIIntelligence.title: Preventing medical errors before they happen.
AIIntelligence.description: CareHub's proprietary AI engine cross-references every new prescription against the patient's entire medical history, instantly detecting dangerous drug-drug interactions and severe allergies.
AIIntelligence.point1Desc: Interactions are flagged instantly while the doctor types, ensuring clinical flow is never interrupted.
AIIntelligence.point2Desc: The AI considers active medications, chronic conditions, and past allergies simultaneously.
AIIntelligence.conflictDesc2: . Co-administration may result in severe symptomatic hypotension.

TrustMetrics.title: Security built into the code.
TrustMetrics.description: We prioritize data privacy through strong authentication and strict role-based access controls.
TrustMetrics.metric1Desc: All user sessions are protected using industry-standard JSON Web Tokens (JWT) and encrypted passwords.
TrustMetrics.metric2Desc: Strict separation of data. Patients only see their own records, and doctors only access the patients they treat.
TrustMetrics.metric3Desc: Your prescriptions, lab results, and vitals are securely stored in the cloud, accessible only by authorized personnel.

CTASection.description: Join thousands of patients and medical professionals who have already made the switch to the most intelligent healthcare ecosystem.
